hero.headline:
We run your website and growth.
You run your business.
hero.description: We embed into your team as your always-on web and growth partner, owning the roadmap, execution, and results so you don't have to.

steps.title: Intro call
steps.description: 30 minutes. We learn your goals, current setup, and the gap. We recommend the right tier.

steps.title: Scoping & proposal
steps.description: We map out the first initiatives, define success metrics, and send a fixed monthly proposal.

steps.title: Kickoff
steps.description: Access setup, Scoreboard live, first initiative briefed. You meet your delivery team.

steps.title: We ship, weekly
steps.description: Showcases land in your inbox. Work flows on cadence. You approve, we ship, repeat.

plans.qualifier: Built for B2B SaaS, fintech, and funded companies (Series A–C) that need a web partner, not a vendor.

tiers.name: Solo Autopilot
tiers.description: For teams that need a single, dedicated workstream executed end-to-end without the overhead of managing it.
changes: Weekly maintenance batch to keep things tight
Choose one track: Build or Growth
tiers.upgradeHint: Move to Dual when you need both tracks running in parallel.

tiers.name: Dual Autopilot
tiers.description: For teams ready to ship site improvements and scale organic visibility at the same time. Build + Growth running simultaneously, with tighter feedback loops.
changes: Run Build + Growth at the same time
Double the showcase and maintenance cadence
Structured testing: we run growth experiments, measure results, and double down on what works
tiers.upgradeHint: Move to Scale when you need 3+ parallel initiatives or multi-stakeholder coordination.

tiers.name: Scale Autopilot
tiers.description: For companies that need full-spectrum execution across multiple workstreams: design, development, SEO, content, and experiments all moving simultaneously.
changes: Rolling maintenance with priority handling, no batching delays
Optional standups if your team prefers live sync

tracks.title: Two Tracks, One Goal
tracks.subtitle: Every engagement runs on one or both tracks. Solo clients pick one. Dual and Scale run both in parallel.

items.label: Build
items.description: Webflow design, development, landing pages, conversion optimization, and continuous UI iteration. Everything that makes your website perform.

items.label: Growth
items.description: SEO, AEO (AI search optimization), content systems, and distribution experiments. Everything that drives qualified traffic to your site.

comparison.title: Compare the Tiers
comparison.footnote: Every engagement is scoped to your goals. Pricing depends on tier, scope, and complexity. Book an intro call and we'll recommend the right fit.

beyondRetainers.title: Special Arrangements
beyondRetainers.description: Every engagement runs through a retainer, but we flex the structure when it makes sense:

options.title: Have a fixed scope?
options.description: We deliver it inside a retainer with a 3-month minimum. You get the same team, cadence, and Scoreboard. We just point all the velocity at your defined deliverable until it ships.

options.title: Performance deals
options.description: For the right partnership, we tie part of our fee to results. You pay for outcomes, not hours. Available case-by-case.

beyondRetainers.ctaText: Talk to Us About Your Scope

items.description: We own the roadmap, planning, and execution. You approve, we ship
Fast async communication during business hours
Live dashboard tracking what's in progress, what shipped, and what's next
Strategic summary of what happened, what we learned, and where we're headed
All work aligned around one high-impact objective each quarter
Regular walkthroughs of work-in-progress before anything goes live
Ongoing fixes, updates, and polish batched into your cadence

items.question: How is pricing determined?
items.answer: Pricing is based on your tier, scope, and complexity. Every engagement starts with an intro call where we assess your needs and recommend the right fit.

items.question: Can I switch tiers?
items.answer: Yes. Scale up when you need more velocity, scale down when things stabilize. We keep it flexible.

items.question: What's the difference between Build and Growth?
items.answer: Build focuses on your Webflow site: launches, redesigns, landing pages, conversion optimization, and continuous UI iteration. Growth focuses on organic visibility: SEO, AEO (AI search optimization), content systems, and distribution experiments. At Dual and above, you run both simultaneously.

items.question: What does "Autopilot" actually mean?
items.answer: It means we don't wait for you to tell us what to do. We own the roadmap, prioritize based on impact, and ship proactively. You stay in the loop through showcases, the Scoreboard, and async updates, but you're not managing us.

items.question: Do you offer one-off projects?
items.answer: Yes. We offer fixed-scope projects with a defined deliverable, price, and timeline. We also offer performance-based deals where part of our fee is tied to results. Book an intro call to discuss.

items.question: What if I'm not sure which plan I need?
items.answer: That's exactly what the intro call is for. We'll walk through your goals, current setup, and bandwidth to recommend the right tier.

cta.title: Stop managing. Start shipping.
cta.subtitle: Book a 30-minute intro call. We'll recommend the right tier for your goals.
